description: The Carlton Crew is a criminal organization based in Melbourne, Australia, founded in the 1970s by Gino Rosace. It is named after the Melbourne suburb of Carlton and has been involved in racketeering, murder, drug trafficking, and other crimes. The group played a significant role in the Melbourne gangland killings and has been a rival to Calabrian 'Ndrangheta groups. As of 2019, Tony Madafferi is the boss.
